normalattack.name: Snow Swan Variation
normalattack.description:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Unleashes a sword attack of up to 5 consecutive strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash a dazzling slash on opponents in front of her.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Attacks opponents in her path while plunging from mid-air, then deals AoE DMG upon landing.

elementalskill.name: Slow Dance: Phantom Night Trance
elementalskill.description: With slow, graceful dance steps, Odette deals AoE Cryo DMG to the opponent, and also summons her {LINK#N11500001}solo dance double{/LINK} to the field. If a dance double summoned by Odette is already on the field, this will re-summon the dance double and reset its duration. Solo dance double Alternates between the Plume and Wing dance moves, periodically attacking nearby opponents and dealing to them AoE Cryo DMG. Additionally, if there is a dance double summoned by Odette nearby, Odette's Elemental Skill Adagio: Phantom Night Dancers will become the special Elemental Skill {LINK#N11500002}Adagio: Cock-Crow Coda{/LINK} instead, where a dance duet deals AoE Cryo DMG to nearby opponents over time. Then, when the duet ends, she deals another instance of AoE Cryo DMG that is considered Stellar-Conduct or Stellar Swirl DMG. "Dance, o candle flame of winter, dance!" "Pain and tears, laughter and happiness... Life, o life! Life is but a fleeting solo dance: one is only briefly alive with music and mirth before they fade into silence as the curtain falls..."

elementalburst.name: Fast Dance: A Dream of Sable Feathers
elementalburst.description: With quick, lively dance steps, Odette deals multiple instances of AoE Cryo DMG to the opponent, and summons her {LINK#N11500001}solo dance double{/LINK}. She also gains Snow Swan's Dream, which increases the Stellar Glimmer reaction DMG Odette deals. \n\nThe dawn-lit clouds were hanging just within reach. It was as though she needed only spread her wings to touch them.

p1.name: The Chosen One's Spring
p1.description: When Odette summons her {LINK#N11500001}solo dance double{/LINK}, she also obtains 4 stacks of {LINK#N11500003}Marvelous Splendor{/LINK}.

p2.name: Pathetique of Pateticheskaya
p2.description: For every 100 ATK Odette has over 1,000, her Stellar Glimmer DMG is additionally increased by 1.5% of the original DMG. She can deal up to 30% more additional DMG in this way.

p3.name: Dance of the Silver Morn
p3.description: Odette will enter the <color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color> or <color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar Glimmer</color> state for 8s when she is inside a <color=#FFD780FF>Polestar Field</color> or triggers a Stellar Swirl reaction respectively.\nWhen a party member triggers a Superconduct or Cryo Swirl reaction, it becomes a Stellar-Conduct or Stellar Swirl reaction instead, and the Base DMG of said reaction is also increased by 0.7% for every 100 points of Odette's ATK. A maximum 14% increase can be obtained in this way.

p4.name: Winter Dream's Echo
p4.description: Shows the locations of <color=#FFD780FF>Snezhnaya's Local Specialties</color> on the mini-map.\nPracticing dance in one's spare time might even trigger other effects...

const1.name: "On This Danceless Morn, She Gazes at Her Double"
const1.description: Unleashing the special Elemental Skill {LINK#N11500002}Adagio: Cock-Crow Coda{/LINK} deals an instance of <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo AoE DMG</color> to nearby opponents that will be considered the corresponding Stellar reaction DMG at a certain percentage of Odette's ATK:<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color>: 200%;\n<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar Swirl</color>: 300%.\nAdditionally, the Passive Talent "Spring Rite of the Chosen One" is also enhanced: now, when Odette summons her {LINK#N11500001}solo dance double{/LINK}, she also gains 2 stacks of {LINK#N11500003}Marvelous Splendor{/LINK}, and when she is off-field, the rate at which Marvelous Splendor</color> is removed is sped up to 2 stacks per second.

const2.name: "I Must See the Snow Swan's Dream for Myself, She Thought"
const2.description:
The Passive Talent "Spring Rite of the Chosen One" is enhanced as follows: every stack of {LINK#N11500003}Marvelous Splendor{/LINK} active also increases the character's ATK by 7%.
Additionally, if Odette is in the <color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar Glimmer</color> state when there is a {LINK#N11500001}solo dance double{/LINK} on the field, opponents near the <color=#FFD780FF>dance double</color> will also have their corresponding Elemental RES lowered by 20%.
·<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color>: <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color> and <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro</color>.
·<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar Swirl</color>: <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color> and <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo</color>.
You must unlock the Passive Talent "Spring Rite of the Chosen One" to gain access to the above effects.

const3.name: "I Must Pursue the Howling Wind and Keep on Moving Up Myself"
const3.description: Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11502}Slow Dance: Phantom Night Trance{/LINK}</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

const4.name: "Upwards I Go, as I Fall Into the Hazy, Burning Sky"
const4.description:
The Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Fast Dance: A Dream of Sable Feathers</color> is enhanced as follows: when Odette obtains <color=#FFD780FF>Snow Swan's Dream</color>, Stellar Glimmer reaction DMG dealt by other party members is increased by 50% of <color=#FFD780FF>Snow Swan Dream</color>'s effects.
When a party member attacks and hits an opponent, Odette will also join in with a coordinated attack, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> that is also considered as the corresponding Stellar reaction DMG. This effect, which can trigger once every 3.5s, will be at a certain percentage of Odette's ATK:
<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color>: 50%;
<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar Swirl</color>: 75%.

const5.name: "Behold, for I Have Bid Farewell to Earthly Suffering"
const5.description: Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11505}Fast Dance: A Dream of Sable Feathers{/LINK} </color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

const6.name: "Reach Out Your Hand to Touch the Eternal Visage of the Sky"
const6.description: The Passive Talent "Spring Rite of the Chosen One" is enhanced as follows: When all nearby party members have been granted {LINK#N11500003}Marvelous Splendor{/LINK} by Odette, her Marvelous Splendor stack will no longer decrease.\nAdditionally, characters affected by <color=#FFD780FF>Marvelous Splendor</color> have their Stellar Glimmer reaction DMG dealt to opponents {LINK#N11190007}<color=#FFD780FF>elevated</color>{/LINK} by 25%, and Stellar Glimmer reaction DMG dealt by Odette is elevated by an additional 20%.\nYou must unlock the Passive Talent "Spring Rite of the Chosen One" to gain access to the above effects.

hyperlinks.name: Elevation
hyperlinks.description: Special DMG Boost effect. It is calculated independently of other DMG Boost effects.

hyperlinks.name: Solo Dance Double
hyperlinks.description:
A psychic double of Odette's that dances a duet with her. May be summoned to the field through her Elemental Skill or Elemental Burst.
Alternates between the Plume and Wing dance moves to periodically attack nearby opponents, dealing AoE Cryo DMG.
A maximum of one solo dance double summoned by Odette is allowed on the field at any one time.

Additionally, when there is a dance double summoned by Odette nearby, her Elemental Skill Adagio: Phantom Night Dancers is changed to the special Elemental Skill Adagio: Cock-Crow Coda.

hyperlinks.name: Slow Dance: Daybreak Finale
hyperlinks.description:
Odette's special Elemental Skill, which deals to nearby opponents AoE Cryo DMG over time. Then, when the dance duet ends, she deals another instance of AoE Cryo DMG that is considered Stellar-Conduct DMG. During the dance duet, Odette can control the direction of the dance steps.
Radiance: Stellar Glimmer: The DMG dealt when the dance duet ends is changed to AoE Cryo DMG of the corresponding Stellar reaction type.

Additionally, after Odette unleashes the special Elemental Skill Slow Dance: Daybreak Finale, should she be in the Radiance: Stellar Glimmer state while her dance double is still on the field, any DMG dealt by the dance double with the two dance moves will also deal additional AoE Cryo DMG of the corresponding Stellar reaction type.

hyperlinks.name: Marvelous Splendor
hyperlinks.description: After unlocking the Passive Talent "The Chosen One's Spring," Odette will obtain a special effect when she summons her solo dance double.\nEvery stack of Marvelous Splendor active increases her Stellar Glimmer DMG by 15%. This lasts until her dance double exits the field or when she summons her solo dance double again.\nWhen Odette is off-field, she loses 1 stack of Marvelous Splendor every 1 second, while all nearby party members gain the corresponding number of Marvelous Splendor stacks at the same time.
